{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Amberwell madra
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Amberwell madra]] is a type of yellow water madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Amberwell madra]] is a type of [[madra]] used by [[Bai Rou]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
